title: pultenaea gunnii var. erecta
intro: Pultenaea gunnii var. erecta, also known as the Erect Bush Pea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Pultenaea gunnii var. erecta include its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to act as a natural antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers can be infused as a tea, or used in tinctures and salves to harness their medicinal properties.
